summary: iOS | FALCON | Custom Button setting is not properly refreshed after disconnecting headset from PC
scenario: Custom button setting fails to refresh available options after disconnecting headset from PC, requiring app restart to update.
description_clean: Custom Button setting is not properly refreshed after disconnecting headset from PC. After unplugging Falcon from the PC, the custom button setting still shows MS Teams as connected and does not update to reflect the change in available options. Only restarting the app refreshes the setting and allows the user to change other providers.
steps: Connect the headset (Falcon) to the PC.
Open the app and configure a custom button setting (e.g., set it to MS Teams).
Disconnect the headset from the PC.
Observe the custom button setting in the app without restarting it.
expected: After disconnecting the headset, the custom button setting should update to reflect the change (e.g., MS Teams should no longer appear as connected, and available options should update accordingly).
actual: After disconnecting the headset, the custom button setting still shows MS Teams as connected and does not update to reflect the change in available options. Only restarting the app refreshes the setting and allows the user to change other providers.
